news.t: Federated Hermes launches Federated Hermes MDT Market Neutral ETF

overview.description: The Federated Hermes MDT Market Neutral ETF (MKTN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long/short alternatives. The fund utilizes a quantitatively-driven market neutral equity strategy, balancing long and short positions within the US equity market. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation while limiting exposure to general stock market risk. MKTN was launched on Sep 24, 2025 and is issued by Federated Hermes.
